rules.message: metric_collector.{h,cc} references concrete recorder type 'ConsoleMetricRecorder'. MetricCollector must operate through the abstract MetricRecorder reference; the checkpoint operation must not be coupled to a specific recorder implementation.
metric_collector uses dynamic_cast. The checkpoint operation must invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger directly through the abstract MetricRecorder reference, without runtime type discovery.

metric_collector contains capability branching (pattern: 'IsBuffered'). The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference. Capability predicates (e.g. IsBuffered, SupportsFlush) break substitutability by making the caller aware of implementation details.

metric_collector contains capability branching (pattern: 'SupportsFlush'). The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference. Capability predicates (e.g. IsBuffered, SupportsFlush) break substitutability by making the caller aware of implementation details.

metric_collector contains capability branching (pattern: 'CanFlush'). The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference. Capability predicates (e.g. IsBuffered, SupportsFlush) break substitutability by making the caller aware of implementation details.

metric_collector contains capability branching (pattern: 'HasBuffer'). The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference. Capability predicates (e.g. IsBuffered, SupportsFlush) break substitutability by making the caller aware of implementation details.

metric_collector contains capability branching (pattern: 'NeedsFlush'). The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference. Capability predicates (e.g. IsBuffered, SupportsFlush) break substitutability by making the caller aware of implementation details.

metric_collector contains capability branching (pattern: 'RequiresFlush'). The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference. Capability predicates (e.g. IsBuffered, SupportsFlush) break substitutability by making the caller aware of implementation details.

metric_collector contains capability branching around a flush-like operation. The checkpoint operation must unconditionally invoke the polymorphic visibility-trigger on the abstract recorder reference.
